sentences_input.text: [PAUSES FOR 3 SECONDS] First of all, the possibility of a human mind, the possibility of a person to, like every spring, to something bring as new flowers that are able to, to bring something new and something that is useful for the society, the community and to develop certainty there that later on will have such impacts upon so many children around the world.

Even until now, when I'm teaching at home, I feel how much beneficial is this findings that I had when I was working with children in the jungles of Africa or in the mountains of South America where I was working with children from parents still living in the primitive society.

When I built concerts with this children orchestra performing music of four centuries, with these children, this was from one side [PAUSES FOR 3 SECONDS] bringing my confidence of the fact that I am in the right [INAUDIBLE] of one new forms of education or perhaps with this multimedia that I was introducing in the music education as a [INAUDIBLE].
And the others cite this all the time in seizing constant thanks to the life that somehow didn't destroy me totally, completely, because of one or other reason, independent of my personal life.

So this is some feeling of [PAUSES FOR 4 SECONDS] obligation that I feel now almost to transmit and leave some of these memories of what was in, in my past for perhaps the future generation that they have the possibility to hear and to experience some of the past through some of the music that I succeed to save and perform.
